description:
Welcome back my sunshine ♡ Paris travel vlog PART 2 is finally here! This is the second leg of the trip I took with my mom.

In this video, you’ll discover:
🍓 Must-visit cafés and viral food spots in Paris
🛍️ The best vintage shopping streets and boutiques in Le Marais
🖼️ Iconic museums like the Louvre, Palais Garnier, and Palace de Versailles
✨ Local tips, outfit inspo, and cozy Parisian vibes 

Whether you're planning a trip or just love travel vlogs, this video is packed with Paris inspiration and thing you should know before visiting Paris ◡̈

🧚🏻‍♀️About Me
hi! my name is Sophie, and I am a NYC corporate girlie who loves food, fashion, and living life to the fullest! if you're curious about NYC lifestyle vlogs, fashion hauls, or just want to see how an extrovert explores the city in her 30s—you're in the right place! So don’t forget to Like, Subscribe & Comment what you’d love to see next 

⏰Timescodes:
0:00 – Intro 
0:43 – Day 1: Brunch at Carette Paris & Luxury Vintage Shopping in Le Marais 4:14 – Day 1: Michelin-Star Dinner at Frenchie Restaurant 
5:32 – Paris Shopping Haul & Fashion Unboxing 
7:24 – Day 2: Parisian Café Vibes & Visit to The Louvre Museum 
8:56 – Day 2: Lunch at LouLou Paris 
10:20 – Day 2: OOTD – Paris Street Style 
10:42 – Evening Ballet at Palais Garnier Opera House 
12:10 – Day 3: Best Croissant in Paris for Breakfast 
13:06 – Exploring Palace of Versailles & Petit Palais Museum 
14:19 – Dinner at TikTok Viral Restaurant: Rojo Paris 
16:30 – Final Dinner at Michelin-Star Pho Restaurant
